mnemonics: CLOUD stands for Consistent, Scalable, On-Demand resources using Ubiquitous networks
Protect data from unauthorized access and ensure confidentiality
keyPoints: 11.1: Types of Cloud Service Models - IaaS, PaaS, SaaS
